name: python3-dasbus
title: python3-dasbus
description:
Pythonic D-Bus library
dasbus provides a pythonic interface to the D-Bus message
bus system. dasbus can be used to access remote objects
and also for object publication.
.
This DBus library is written in Python 3, based on GLib and inspired by pydbus.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-dasbus because Pythonic D-Bus library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-dasbus as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-dasbus with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-dasbus --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
